text.title: Security as Code (Policy as Code) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-pipeline-stages
step.input: current CI workflows + cluster admission controller status
step.action: Map each SDLC phase to a security gate. Identify missing gates.

step.name: wire-pr-gates
step.action: Add Trivy / Semgrep / gitleaks jobs to PR workflow. Configure fail-on critical/high.

step.name: deploy-admission-controller
step.action: Install Kyverno (or OPA Gatekeeper). Apply baseline policies (no-root, no-host-network, image-signed).
step.note: Gate: If team rejects enforce mode, stay in audit but set 30-day enforcement deadline.

step.name: enable-signing-and-verification
step.action: Add cosign to build. Add Sigstore policy-controller to admission. Verify by pushing an unsigned test image (must reject).

step.name: wire-audit-log
step.action: Ship admission + runtime policy events to SIEM. Build a weekly violations dashboard.
